name: filenamemaker
description: Standardized filename builder and batch file renamer

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/app && cp index.html sw.js robots.txt dist/ && cp app/index.html dist/app/ && cp -r assets docs terms dist/ && esbuild js/app.js --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/js/app.js && esbuild css/style.css --minify --outfile=dist/css/style.css
